archetype.name: Swiss & High-Contrast
archetype.rationale: For an internal business document management system, the priority is objective clarity, dense data presentation, and authority. The design must be distraction-free to enhance productivity for receptionists and department heads.

headings.usage_rules: Use for all page titles, widget titles, and numbers/stats. Never center by default. Use tracking-tight for sizes above 32px.

body.usage_rules: Strictly for tabular data, labels, timestamps, and input fields. Enhances legibility of complex data.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: High density but structured. Use The 'Control Room' Grid protocol.
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Use flat backgrounds with 1px subtle borders (border-border). No soft shadows on cards, use crisp 1px borders instead.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) to maintain the Swiss Brutalist authoritative look.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strictly left-aligned text. Avoid centering to maintain an objective scanning flow (F-pattern).

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors border border-black
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors border border-border
buttons.danger: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white border border-border/60 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-border/60 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-sm hover:border-border transition-all cursor-pointer

tables.header: bg-slate-50 border-b border-border text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500 py-3 px-4

inputs.default: border border-border bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm rounded-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black focus:border-black transition-all
inputs.label: block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 mb-1.5

navigation.sidebar: w-64 bg-slate-50 border-r border-border h-screen flex flex-col
navigation.header: h-16 bg-white border-b border-border flex items-center px-6 sticky top-0 z-50

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and links MUST explicitly change color on hover. Row highlights in tables use extreme subtlety (bg-slate-50).
motion_and_interactions.modals: Slide-in from right (Drawer style) preferred over centered popups for document details, ensuring background context remains visible.

icons_strategy.usage: Use icons strictly for functional signposting (e.g., document types, actions like download/forward, navigation items). Do not use decorative icons.

auth_background.description: Clean, architectural white minimal office background for the login/register screen.
auth_background.usage: Use as a full-cover background image on the split-screen auth layout.

brand_logo.usage: Display in the sidebar header and login screen.

user_avatar.description: Professional corporate headshot for the default user profile.
user_avatar.usage: Use in the top right header dropdown or profile settings.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case representing their role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use the generic 'Inter' font for headings; strictly use 'Outfit' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text.
Implement the 'Swiss Brutalist' layout. Avoid generous rounded corners; use rounded-none or rounded-sm. Emphasize grid lines with thin borders (border-border).
Use Shadcn UI components (Tables, Dialogs, Selects, Dropdowns) but customize them heavily to remove the default rounded Vercel-look and replace it with crisp, square corners.
For the document states, use the specific color tokens provided in colors.status to generate clear, high-contrast badges.
The Dashboard must use the 'Control Room' grid strategy. Optimize vertical space. Use dense data rows rather than large empty cards.
For forms (e.g., document entry), use a strictly left-aligned, structured grid layout rather than a single centered column.
Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image APIs. Rely solely on the media_urls provided.
Implement JWT-based mock authentication flow in Spanish.
